Creator, 2025

Party
Web & Mobile

Team Designer, 2024

I've collaborated with innovative companies to design fun and creative digital experiences. At PartyDAO (2022–present), I've contributed to the design of party.app and World apps, shaping engaging and user-friendly products.
Previously, I was the founding designer at Showtime (2021–2022), leading the product design direction. In 2021, I also collaborated with WorkOS, creating compelling marketing graphics and visual materials.
From 2015–2017, I worked at Bitovi, delivering major web projects for brands including Lowe's and Levi's. Prior to this, between 2013–2017, I pursued experimental 3D projects as a freelance designer. Early in my career at Scribd (2010–2012), I focused on designing and enhancing their core website.

v1.3
